# ascribe

ascribe scans R projects for package and function use. Other packages
can use the results to generate citations without maintaining their own
parser.

## Installation

You can install the development version of ascribe from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("VisruthSK/ascribe")
```

## Example

Build a package universe, then cite the code that uses it:

``` r

library(ascribe)

universe <- build_universe_data("stats")
usage <- scan_usage(path, universe$packages, universe$export_index, universe$origin_map)
cite_usage(usage)
```

## Limitations

- The scanner records function calls, not function references. It
  ignores `lapply(x, mean)` and `purrr::map(x, sd)`.
- Its built-in Markdown parser recognizes R chunks headed with `{r}`.
  Plain fenced blocks with an `r` info string are skipped.
- Package attachments are tracked within each file. A setup script that
  calls [`library()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/library.html) does not
  establish attachment state for another file.
- Default package citations require the package to be installed. Supply
  `package_citations` for packages that are unavailable locally.
- Scanning a namespace inspects its bindings for R6 classes. Active
  bindings can run their getters, and unusually deep generated
  expressions can exceed R’s recursion limits.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`build_export_index()`](https://visruthsk.github.io/ascribe/reference/build_export_index.md)
  : Build an inverted export index
- [`build_origin_map()`](https://visruthsk.github.io/ascribe/reference/build_origin_map.md)
  : Build an origin map for package functions
- [`build_universe_data()`](https://visruthsk.github.io/ascribe/reference/build_universe_data.md)
  : Build scanner data for a package universe
- [`cite_usage()`](https://visruthsk.github.io/ascribe/reference/cite_usage.md)
  : Cite package and function use in a project
- [`collect_pkg_funs()`](https://visruthsk.github.io/ascribe/reference/collect_pkg_funs.md)
  : Collect exported functions and R6 methods from a package
- [`generate_universe_sysdata()`](https://visruthsk.github.io/ascribe/reference/generate_universe_sysdata.md)
  : Generate sysdata.rda for a package universe
- [`resolve_origin()`](https://visruthsk.github.io/ascribe/reference/resolve_origin.md)
  : Resolve the origin package of an exported function
- [`scan_usage()`](https://visruthsk.github.io/ascribe/reference/scan_usage.md)
  : Find used functions and packages

### All vignettes

- [Build a Citation
  Scanner](https://visruthsk.github.io/ascribe/articles/build-a-citation-scanner.md):
